description: Pen trials in various hands, including signatures, biblical phrases and a note dated Tevet 1397 (= 1085 CE) with the names Mevorakh b. Mufarrij ha-Kohen (vocalised) and Ṣedaqa b. ʿAmram. (Information from CUDL) Interestingly, this note was written a century after the legal document on recto.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
